# Several companies have indicated they are satisfied with their currentÉ*Created: Tuesday, May 23, 2023 at 1:29:28?PM*<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">Several companies have indicated they are </span><b><span style="font-size: 19px">satisfied with their current staffing arrangements</span></b><span style="font-size: 19px">, </span><b><span style="font-size: 19px">either using in-house resources or long-term hiring agencies.</span></b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">A notable number of potential clients have expressed a willingness to keep us in mind for future needs or to pass our information along, indicating that there is potential interest even if it's not immediate.</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">Interestingly, we've also run into scenarios where the individual contacted was not the appropriate person for these discussions. This suggests we need to do more homework to ensure we're reaching out to the right personnel who make these decisions.</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">When and w</span><span style="font-size: 19px">here wo</span><span style="font-size: 19px">uld you u</span><span style="font-size: 19px">se s</span><span style="font-size: 19px">taffing fir</span><span style="font-size: 19px">ms</span><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">W</span><span style="font-size: 19px">ould thi</span><span style="font-size: 19px">s</span><span style="font-size: 19px"> be a </span><span style="font-size: 19px">value </span><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></li>
<li><br></li>
<li><br></li>
</ul>
<div><b>- SambaNova Systems </b></div>
<div><b>- Petersen Precision</b></div>
<div><b>- Infinity Medical </b></div>
<div><b>- XGigCapital</b></div>
<div><b>- CFRI Cystic Fibrosis Research Inc</b></div>
<div><b>- Artiman</b></div>
<div><b>- Sina</b></div>
<div><b>- Welbo</b></div>
<div><b>- Infovity Recvue</b></div>
<div><b>- Argonaut Window and Doors </b><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>- </b><b>Petersen Precision Engineering</b><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>- </b><b>Redwood City public library</b><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Streamline your hiring?<br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I pulled it from LinkedIn and I think her title was wrong.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div><b>Here's her response:</b><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>&quotHi Leon,</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I appreciate your response, however, IŐm not sure a salesperson would be involved in the discussions regarding the services</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>you are offering ? HR, Operations, C-Level (or the very least Director) should be your target demographic (just my two cents)</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I wish you luck in your marketing campaign and have a great weekend.&quotĘ</div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Thanks Leon! Few things:Ę</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>- Given that you pulled it from LI (as she clearly promos them/her team activelyĘhiring) did you mention this in your response to her so she can understandĘwhere that lead (her) came from?Ę</div>
<div>- She's telling you to go to HR, Ops, Dir+ level - did you pivot to then ask if she can kindly email intro you to one of her HR/TA colleagues so you can connect w/ someone from Compass Manufacturing to share all the staffing services SSC does?Ę</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Interesting that she would promo hiring and be so surprisedĘthat you reached out to her as a staffing service companyĘeven though she's in sales.Ę<i>ButĘ</i>also, given thatĘshe's been in sales for quite a long time (since '84) she may be a great asset and a helpfulĘrelationship re: the sales world to have. Just food forĘthought.Ę<br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Hello Mimi!</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Thank you for your feedback and suggestions.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>In my initial outreach to her, I didn't mention that I found her profile on LinkedIn, but I see now how that could have provided some context. I'll make sure to include that information in future communications.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Regarding her suggestion to connect with HR, Ops, or Director + level, I didn't directly ask for an introduction in my initial response. However, I agree that it would be beneficial to have a direct connection at Compass Manufacturing. I'll follow up with her and kindly ask if she could introduce me to one of her HR/TA colleagues.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I also appreciate your insight about her potential value as a connection in the sales world. I'll keep that in mind and try to nurture this relationship further.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Thanks again for your guidance. I'll implement these suggestions in my follow-up communication.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Warmly,</div>
<div>Leon</div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Hello JJ,</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Good work yesterday.Ę</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>The missing link that may be hindering us from a 2-way dialogue seems to be to identify and directly engage with the right decision-makers within the organizations we're targeting. A lot of the interactions are with receptionists or during times when key personnel are unavailable.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Here are some questions we should be asking next time we are out in the field and to improve two-way dialogues:</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>1. &quotWho is the person responsible for making decisions regarding your staffing needs?&quot</div>
<div>2. &quotWhen would be the best time to discuss our services with the decision-maker?&quot</div>
<div>3. &quotWhat are the current challenges your organization is facing in terms of staffing and recruitment?&quot</div>
<div>4. &quotAre you currently satisfied with your staffing solutions? If not, what areas need improvement?&quot</div>
<div>5. &quotCan you please describe your ideal recruiting or staffing agency?&quot (<i>you can ask this on the phone</i>Ę<b>TODAY)</b><br></div>
<div>6. &quotWould it be possible to schedule an appointment with the appropriate party to discuss our staffing solutions?&quot (<i>not in the field but when dialing today and in the future)</i><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Instead of us randomly dropping by companies, we will need to continue trying to schedule appointments ahead of time, or at least find out when theĘ<b>best time to visit is</b>. This will increase our chances of talking directly with decision-makers, hence fostering more two-way dialogue and potential leads. Also,Ę<i>LinkedIn messages and texting (is not being utilized enough. Please focus on dials and LINKEDIN today!)Ę</i>let me know if you have questions or need ideas.Ę</div>
<div><br></div>
